## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, competitor research, and SEO progress.](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Competitor research completed; Gong identified as best organic player](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Content audit in progress; 25 opportunities for content refresh identified](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [New content strategy focuses on sales enablement and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Team aligned on content approach; mixing refreshes (3-4) and net new (1-2) posts weekly](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [New landing page nearly ready, expected to improve conversions and rankings](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

## Topics

### Competitor Research and Keyword Strategy

  - [Analyzed competitors' traffic and keywords; Gong emerges as top organic performer](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Implementing keyword gap analysis vs. Gong for new content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Expanding keyword focus beyond sales to AI roleplay and related tools](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Meeting with Nick scheduled to dive deeper into customer pain points and competitor struggles](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

### Content Audit and Refresh Strategy

  - [25 content refresh opportunities identified; prioritizing based on keyword performance](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Reducing new blog posts to \~5/week; mix of 3-4 refreshes and 1-2 net new](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Consolidating redundant content (e.g., merging 6 sales objection posts into one strong piece)](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Prioritizing content aligned with new cluster strategy (sales enablement, pain points)](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)

### SEO Performance and LLM Considerations

  - [Exec ranking well for "LLMs for roleplay platform" due to strong roleplay article](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Discussion on whether to include direct competitors in content or maintain current approach](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Team leans towards maintaining current strategy to avoid giving competitors "link juice"](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Noted difference between traditional SERP and LLM search behavior](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)

### Website Updates and On-Page Optimization

  - [New landing page nearly complete; expected to boost conversions and rankings](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Current platform page appearing in search results without recent optimization](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Plans to improve H1s, H2s, and page titles with relevant keywords](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Focus on natural, long-tail descriptions for both LLM and traditional search optimization](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share competitor research analysis link post-meeting](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)

  - [Continue content audit and refresh prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Implement new content strategy focusing on sales enablement and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Monitor performance of "AI roleplay platforms" page](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Launch new landing page and track its impact on conversions and rankings](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Complete migration to new Content OS version](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Prepare 3-month data overview for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Reschedule next week's meeting due to Garrett's conference (aiming for Friday)](https://fathom.video/share/rdXxX2H2yszyUxzzAxLHy9n7uGcJGgDL?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
